entries.question: What can this chatbot help me with?
entries.answer: I can look up your timetable, exam dates, assignment reminders, faculty contacts, club info, affordable food options, cafe details, and help you place direct orders or find a student delivery partner. Just ask in plain English.

entries.question: How should I phrase my questions?
entries.answer: Ask naturally - for example: 'What's my BCA sem 3 timetable on Monday?', 'When is the DBMS exam?', or 'Who do I contact for accounting?'. Including your program and semester helps me give precise answers.

entries.question: Where is Tetso College located?
entries.answer: Tetso College is located at 7th Mile, Chumukedima, Dimapur, Nagaland - 797115. The nearest landmark is the NH-29 highway junction.

entries.question: When does the semester start and end?
entries.answer: Odd semesters run July to November and even semesters run January to May. Winter break is typically mid-December to early January; summer break is June. Refer to the official academic calendar on the college website for exact dates.

entries.question: I lost something on campus - where do I check?
entries.answer: Lost and found items are kept at the Security Office near Gate 1 for 14 days before being archived. You can also post in the student notice group with a description and your contact.

entries.question: How do I contact the administration office?
entries.answer: The Administration Office is on the ground floor of the Main Block. Reach them at admin@tetsocollege.edu.in or +91-3862-242301 during 09:00-16:00, Mon-Fri.
